text:
Wong (ウォン, Won) is a man working in the zoological agency of the Kakin Empire. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 18, Chapter 187 

Appearance

Wong appears to be in his mid 40's and is slightly overweight. He's well dressed and groomed. He has brown hair and thick, brown eyebrows. 

Personality

Won presented himself as kind and appreciative for the wonderful work done by Kite and the Amateur Hunters. 

Plot

Chimera Ant arc

Wong thanks Kite and the Amateur Hunters for their excellent work on his job request. He claims that all of what they've accomplished was more than what the agency he works for would be able to accomplish in two centuries. Humbly, Kite downplays the praise and admits it was a fun job to do. Though Wong promises that he'll recommend Kite and his group to other agencies and countries in return for the biological survey that was carried out for Kakin. 

After signing Kite's contract, Wong mentions a rumor from the Southernpiece Auction House. Apparently, they'd found part of an amazing undiscovered lifeform, and they're looking to hire Hunters to go and find and bring back a live specimen. 

Manga Appearances

Trivia

In Crunchyroll's translation of the 2011 anime adaptation, the character's name is "Won". Hunter × Hunter - Episode 77 (2011)
